name: Marinated Beef Roll
recipeInstructions:
MARINADE
1. In a food processor bowl fitted with a steel blade, place pimento, olives, eggplant, green onion and parsley. Process until minced.
2. Add eggs; pulse 10-12 times to combine, scraping down sides once. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Spread approximately 1/4 cup of the egg mixture evenly over each slice of roast beef, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
4. Roll tightly and secure with toothpicks. Place seam side down in a shallow baking dish.
MARINADE
5. Whisk together oil, parsley, lemon juice, capers, garlic, basil, thyme, bay leaf, salt and pepper in a bowl; pour over beef rolls.
6. Marinate for 1 hour in the refrigerator, turning occasionally.
7. To serve, cut each beef roll crosswise into 1 1/2-inch pieces, spooning marinade over the beef rolls.
